channel.title: OpenAI-Selection
channel.description: OpenAI News から選別された記事フィード

item.title: OpenAIとBroadcomがLLM最適化推論チップを発表(OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip)
item.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
